text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Match type is three-way (PO + GRN + invoice) iff a GRN exists for the line/category (materials); otherwise two-way (PO + invoice) plus milestone acceptance (services, freight, no-GRN). A duplicate-invoice pre-check on supplier + invoice number + amount runs before matching. Tolerance is

evaluated on price%, qty%, and an absolute amount, all tax-inclusive; within tolerance auto-clears. Outside tolerance classifies one exception type {price-variance | qty-over | qty-under | missing-GR | duplicate-invoice | tax-mismatch} routed to its resolver (Buyer / Receiving / Tax / Finance) with
resolution accept | adjust | credit-note | debit-note | reject. A cleared match relieves GR/IR and moves the commitment to actual.
